steps.description: Narrative intro — Children Incorporated runs sponsorships across 23 countries; following one lifecycle today

actions.value: Children Incorporated runs sponsorships across 23 countries. Today we're following one sponsorship from enrollment to transfer — the lifecycle their team asked us to optimize.

steps.description: Aisha (Kenya) clicks New Child and fills the form: Daniel, Year 3, Mwanza Primary, Math, Drawing/Football; Site = Helping Schools Kenya
Daniel record renders with related Site__c panel populated (country=Kenya, coordinator=Aisha, program level=Primary) — sponsorship-ready from one save
Joseph (HQ) opens Available Children list view; Daniel appears at the top; clicks into Daniel's record
Joseph clicks 'Sponsor This Child' on Daniel's record; fills donor=Margaret Hartwell, $40 monthly, start=today; saves
Unified view shows three records: Gift Commitment, Gift Commitment Schedule (12 installments), and first Gift Transaction (scheduled)
Narrative — three-year jump; Margaret has given $1,440; her job changes; she emails to cancel

actions.value: Three years go by. Margaret has given $1,440 to Daniel's education. Then her job changes. She emails to cancel.

steps.description: Joseph navigates to Margaret's Gift Commitment, clicks Close, selects reason='Donor Financial Hardship', saves
Cut to Aisha's Tasks list view (Helping Schools Kenya queue); the reassignment task is already there with Daniel's name and the cancel reason
Narrative — six months pass; Daniel ages out of primary; Margaret returns wanting to sponsor again

actions.value: Six months later, Daniel finishes Year 6 and ages out of the primary program. Margaret has paused giving but called back wanting to sponsor again. Today this would be a 3-day round trip across systems and time zones.

steps.description: Joseph clicks 'Transfer Sponsorship' on Margaret's closed Gift Commitment
List of available children at the same site (Helping Schools Kenya) ranked by age and need; Sarah at the top; Joseph picks Sarah and confirms
New Gift Commitment for Margaret → Sarah is active. Daniel's record shows 'Sponsored by Margaret Sept 2024-May 2026 (aged out)'. Sarah's record shows the new sponsor and the prior sponsorship history
Brief Setup detour — show GiftCommitment Cancel Reason picklist values + Transfer Sponsorship Flow high-level diagram (30s)
Narrative close — recap each persona's outcome

actions.value: Aisha enrolls in 2 minutes, not 2 days. Joseph matches in 90 seconds, not 20. Cancellations route same-day. Transfers — the #1 ask — are 2 clicks. The lifecycle works.
